metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Billy Joel - Piano Man.flac
metadata.title: Piano Man
metadata.lyrics:
[00:30.78] It's nine o'clock on a Saturday
[00:35.44] The regular crowd shuffles in
[00:39.03] There's an old man sittin' next to me
[00:43.18] Makin' love to his tonic and gin
[00:48.32] 
[00:56.96] He says, "Son can you play me a memory?
[01:01.52] I'm not really sure how it goes
[01:05.48] But it's sad and it's sweet and I knew it complete
[01:09.62] When I wore a younger man's clothes"
[01:14.16] La, la-la, di-di-da
[01:18.90] La-la di-di-da da-dum
[01:26.27] Sing us a song, you're the piano man
[01:30.33] Sing us a song tonight
[01:34.16] Well, we're all in the mood for a melody
[01:38.46] And you've got us feelin' alright
[01:43.37] 
[01:56.71] Now John at the bar is a friend of mine
[02:00.89] He gets me my drinks for free
[02:04.73] And he's quick with a joke, or to light up your smoke
[02:08.82] But there's some place that he'd rather be
[02:14.37] He says, "Bill, I believe this is killing me"
[02:18.62] As a smile ran away from his face
[02:22.83] "Well, I'm sure that I could be a movie star
[02:27.04] If I could get out of this place"
[02:31.13] Oh, la, la-la, di-di-da
[02:35.70] La-la di-di-da da-dum
[02:43.19] Now Paul is a real estate novelist
[02:47.39] Who never had time for a wife
[02:51.46] And he's talkin' with Davy, who's still in the navy
[02:55.56] And probably will be for life
[02:59.91] 
[03:09.33] And the waitress is practicing politics
[03:13.44] As the businessmen slowly get stoned
[03:17.24] Yes, they're sharing a drink they call loneliness
[03:21.42] But it's better than drinkin' alone
[03:26.45] 
[03:41.47] Sing us the song, you're the piano man
[03:45.68] Sing us a song tonight
[03:49.20] Well, we're all in the mood for a melody
[03:53.44] And you've got us feelin' alright
[03:58.18] 
[04:11.50] It's a pretty good crowd for a Saturday
[04:15.67] And the manager gives me a smile
[04:19.67] 'Cause he knows that it's me they've been comin' to see
[04:23.77] To forget about life for a while
[04:29.17] And the piano, it sounds like a carnival
[04:33.23] And the microphone smells like a beer
[04:37.11] And they sit at the bar and put bread in my jar
[04:41.23] And say man what are you doin' here?
[04:45.20] Oh, la, la-la, di-di-da
[04:49.92] La-la di-di-da da-dum
[04:57.23] Sing us the song, you're the piano man
[05:01.44] Sing us a song tonight
[05:04.94] Well, we're all in the mood for a melody
[05:09.11] And you've got us feelin' alright
[05:11.56]
